welcome: Choose a mode to get started
start_client_desc: Connect to a running CS4S server and browse its files.
start_server_desc: Host a server that students can connect to.
connection_error: Could not connect to the server
tooltip_connect: Open a TCP connection and authenticate with the server.
tooltip_disconnect: Send QUIT and close the socket gracefully.
tooltip_refresh: Re-send LIST to refresh the current directory.
tooltip_new_folder: Send MKDIR to create a folder in the current directory.
tooltip_upload: Stream a local file to the server in 4KB chunks.
tooltip_download: Stream a remote file to your disk in 4KB chunks.
tooltip_lab_view_client: Switch to the Protocol Inspector: the raw TX/RX strings behind every action.
raw_command_placeholder: Type a raw protocol command (e.g. LIST|path)
proto_explain_hint_default: Select a command in the console to see its explanation.
proto_explain_unknown: No explanation available for this selection.
proto_explain_hello: Handshake: negotiates the protocol version before anything else can happen.
proto_explain_auth: Authentication: sends credentials. Educational note — this protocol sends them in plaintext.
proto_explain_list: Directory Listing: asks the server for the files in the current path.
proto_explain_upload: Upload Request: tells the server to prepare for an incoming byte stream.
proto_explain_download: Download Request: asks the server to start streaming a file's bytes.
proto_explain_mkdir: Make Directory: creates a new folder inside the user's sandbox.
proto_explain_delete: Delete: removes a file or folder from the server.
proto_explain_rename: Rename: changes a file or folder's name in place.
proto_explain_move: Move: relocates a file into a different directory.
proto_explain_quit: Disconnect: politely closes the connection before the socket drops.
proto_explain_ping: Latency Probe: round-trips a tiny message to measure network delay (RTT).
tooltip_send_raw: Bypass the GUI: send this exact string as a raw protocol command.
tooltip_protocol_console: Every string sent (→) and received (←) over the socket, in order.
logs_placeholder: Log activity will appear here once the server starts.
lab_stats_idle:
Throughput: -- KB/s TX / -- KB/s RX
Connections: 0  •  Packets: 0
lab_stats_readout:
Throughput: {tx} KB/s TX / {rx} KB/s RX
Connections: {connections}  •  Packets: {packets}
tooltip_start_server: Bind the listening socket and begin accepting connections.
tooltip_stop_server: Stop listening and disconnect every connected client.
tooltip_lab_view_server: Switch to the Connection Graph, Socket States, and Teacher Controls.
tooltip_add_user: Create a new student account in this sandbox.
tooltip_force_drop: Immediately close the selected client's socket, simulating a network failure.
tooltip_simulate_latency: Delay each incoming packet by this many seconds before processing it.
tooltip_simulate_packet_loss: Randomly drop this percentage of incoming packets, simulating a lossy network.
